home.title: Wepisia

home.twoByTwoDesc: 2×2 tɛbl zu, odds ratio la risk relatif maaneg.
home.biostatisticsDesc: Panga maaneg ha Mantel‑Haenszel tɛsse, bõe yaa a soaba yĩngr sẽn yaa sɩda.
home.aiDescription: Fo segd n gũus foom sekr sẽn yit a soaba.
home.geospatialDescription: Épidémie yɛla yãk-yãk tẽngã zug ne heatmaps la clusters sẽn yaa vɩɩm.

stdMortalityCalculator.title: SMR gʋlsgo
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Bãan-wilgri la kũum sõor-yõoda.
stdMortalityCalculator.exactCI: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng sẽn yaa sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.ciExactTitle: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng ({{confidence}}%) – Sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Kũum sẽn yaa bɩlg (yãk ≤ 5), tũ sõngr sɩda (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.jstatMissing: jStat pa be – sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng la p-yõoda lebgla maan-wilgri.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% wʋsga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% bɩlga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Kũum wʋsg yaa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC fãa be 1.0 rɩtɩ).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Kũum bɩlg yaa sɩd n yɩɩ bɩlg (IC fãa be 1.0 nudga).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationNotSignif: Wʋgdgã pa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC bee 1.0 pʋgẽ).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: SMR wɛɛnga kũum sẽn yãka ne kũum sẽn da yaa tẽed bɩ ninsaal sẽn be zĩig a yembr pʋgẽ.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC wilgd tɩ lebgrã yaa sɩda. Sã n bee 1.0 pʋgẽ, lebgrã pa sɩd.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: Yit Poisson la χ². Sõngr sẽn yaa sɩda kũum bɩlg wɛɛnga.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Lebgr Fisher sẽn yaa bɩlg, pa sõngd wʋsg.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpByarDesc: Rothman & Boice (1979) maan-wilgri, yaa sɩda O > 5.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpVdbDesc: Sõngr sẽn yaa bɩlg (1982) : IC = SMR × (1 ± 1,96/√O).

stdMortalityCalculator.title: SMR gʋlsgo
stdMortalityCalculator.subtitle: Bãan-wilgri la kũum sõor-yõoda.
stdMortalityCalculator.ciExactTitle: Sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng ({{confidence}}%) – Sɩda
stdMortalityCalculator.footnote: * Kũum sẽn yaa bɩlg (yãk ≤ 5), tũ sõngr sɩda (Fisher, Mid‑P).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationHigher: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% wʋsga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationLower: Kũum yaa {{percent}}% bɩlga tẽed sẽn da yaa.
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifHigh: Wʋsgã yaa sɩd n yɩɩ wʋsg (IC fãa be 1,0 rɩtɩ).
stdMortalityCalculator.interpretationSignifLow: Bɩlgã yaa sɩd n yɩɩ bɩlg (IC fãa be 1,0 nudga).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpPrinciple: SMR yaa yõod sẽn wɛɛnga kũum sẽn yãka ne kũum sẽn da yaa tẽed.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpCi: IC sẽn pa tɩk 1,0 wilgd tɩ lebgrã yaa sɩd.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpExactDesc: IC Garwood (1936) yit χ². Tɛst Poisson sɩda. Sõngr OpenEpi.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpMidPDesc: Tɛst Mid-P Lancaster (1961). Pa sõngd wʋsg. IC yit bisection.
stdMortalityCalculator.helpRgDesc: IC log-normal : exp(ln(SMR) ± z/√obs). Rothman & Greenland (1998).
stdMortalityCalculator.helpChi2Desc: Pearson χ² (1 ddl). Pa kõt IC.
stdMortalityCalculator.reportFooter: Raport sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã — bãan-wilgri tʋm-tʋmd.

twoByTwoTable.title: Taabal 2×2
twoByTwoTable.explanation: Taabal 2×2 wɛɛnga bãan (ẽe/ayi) ne bãan (ẽe/ayi). Sõngr kõt: Fisher tɛst, mid-p, khi-karrɛ, odds ratio, bãan wʋgdg, bãan bɩlg, la bõn-kɩtba.

proportions.title: Wɛɛng-yõoda
proportions.description: Wɛɛng-yõod sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng.
proportions.useCaseDescription: Ninsaal 500 pʋgẽ, 75 yaa bãan. Bãan wɛɛnga yaa wãn?

proportionsSample.title: Wɛɛng-yõod tɩlg-sõor
proportionsSample.explanation: Tʋm-tʋmd kõt tɩlg-sõor sẽn tõe n paam wɛɛng-yõod sɩda.
proportionsSample.exampleDescription: Bɩ tɩlg-sõor wɛɛnga 20% ne sɩd-wʋgdg ±3% la yam kãseng 95% :

oneRate.title: Tũudg a yembr tɛst
oneRate.explanation: Wɛɛnga tũudg sẽn yãka ne tũudg sẽn yaa tẽed. Tũudg Poisson kũum bɩlg wɛɛnga.
oneRate.exampleDescription: Ninsaal 10 000 sẽn tũ wakat 5 yẽ, bãan 25 yãka.

compareTwoRates.title: Tũudb a yi manegre
compareTwoRates.explanation: Wɛɛnga tũudb a yi yit ninsaal-wakat. Kõt tũudg yõod (rate ratio) la tũudg wʋgdg ne IC, la Mantel-Haenszel tɛst.

anova.title: ANOVA a yembr
anova.description: Sor wɛɛnga sẽn yaa wʋsg (3 bɩ wʋsga).
anova.explanation: ANOVA wɛɛnga tẽed tɩ sor wɛɛnga fãa yaa a yembr. Wɛɛnga sor wʋgdg sor sẽn be sɩngr pʋgẽ ne sor sẽn be sɩngr a taab pʋgẽ.

tTest.title: Student t-tɛst
tTest.description: Sor a yi manegre (sɩngr sẽn pa taab).
tTest.explanation: t-tɛst wɛɛnga sor a yi. Kõt Student t-tɛst (sor wʋgdg yaa a yembr) la Welch t-tɛst (sor wʋgdg yaa a yi).

meanConfidenceInterval.title: Sor sogsg sẽn kõt yam kãseng
meanConfidenceInterval.explanation: IC sor yit sɩngr (n, sor, écart-type). Tũ Student t.

meanDifferencePower.title: Sor wʋgdg pʊs-kãseng
meanDifferencePower.explanation: Pʊs-kãseng yaa sɩd n lebg tɛst. Kõt tɩlg-sõor, wʋgdg tẽed, la sor wʋgdg.

meanDifferenceSample.title: Sor wʋgdg tɩlg-sõor
meanDifferenceSample.explanation: Tɩlg-sõor n paam sor wʋgdg tẽed.
meanDifferenceSample.standardDeviation: • Écart-type (σ) — a yembr bɩ a yi

medianPercentileCi.title: Tẽnga la pɛrsɛntɩl IC
medianPercentileCi.description: Sõngr sẽn pa tũ sor tẽed.
medianPercentileCi.explanation: IC tẽnga la pɛrsɛntɩl (25e, 75e) yit binomial bɩ sõor.

unmatchedCaseControl.title: Bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg manegre
unmatchedCaseControl.description: Bãan ne bãan sõsg bãan-yembr zãn-kɩtba pʋgẽ.
unmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Manegr bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg. Kõt OR, IC 95% la Mantel-Haenszel χ² tɛst.

sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.title: Tɩlg-sõor (bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg)
sampleSizeUnmatchedCaseControl.explanation: Tɩlg-sõor bãan-yembr sẽn pa sõng tɩrg. Kõt tɩlg-sõor ne yam kãseng, pʊs-kãseng, bãan yit wɛɛnga sɩngr pʋgẽ, la OR.

matchedCaseControl.title: Bãan-yembr sõng tɩrg manegre
matchedCaseControl.description: Sõor sẽn sõng tɩrg (1:1, 1:n, M:N) manegre.
matchedCaseControl.explanation: Bãan-yembr sẽn sõng tɩrg, kõt OR Mantel-Haenszel, IC, la McNemar tɛst.

cohort.title: Koort zãn-kɩtba manegre
cohort.description: Bãan wʋgdg (RR), bãan bɩlg (RD), la bõn-kɩtba.
cohort.explanation: Koort zãn-kɩtba pʋgẽ, bãan yãka la bãan pa yãk be n tũ wakat. Kõt RR, RD, la bõn-kɩtba.

rct.title: RCT (randomized controlled trial)
rct.explanation: Kõt RR, ARR, NNT, ne IC.

screening.title: Bãan-nongre tɛst manegre
screening.description: Sensibilité, spécificité, VPP, VPN, likelihood ratios.
screening.explanation: Wɛɛnga bãan-nongre tɛst ne gold standard. Kõt sensibilité, spécificité, VPP, VPN, likelihood ratios, Youden, Kappa.

doseResponse.title: Dose-response (χ² tendance)
doseResponse.description: Tendance linéaire tɛst bãan tɩlg wʋsg wɛɛnga.
doseResponse.explanation: Mantel-Haenszel χ² tendance linéaire tɛst. Kõt p-yõod 1 ddl.

rByCTable.title: Taabal R x C
rByCTable.description: Taabal sẽn yaa tɩlg fãa manegre.
rByCTable.explanation: Manegr taabal R (sõor) × C (tẽng). Kõt Pearson χ², G², coefficient de contingence, Cramer V.
rByCTable.associationBloodGroupDisease: Sõsg zĩm sɩngr ne bãan (3 sɩngr × 4 wilgri)

randomNumbers.title: Sõor sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã yãkdg
randomNumbers.description: Sõor sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã randomisation la maan-wilgri wɛɛnga.
randomNumbers.explanation: Yãkd sõor uniforme, normale, binomiale, Poisson. Tõe n yãk sõor RCT randomisation.
randomNumbers.randomization100Patients: Randomisation ninsaal 100 sɩngr a yi pʋgẽ (1:1) :

simulation.description: Bãan-wilgri sẽn yit zĩig a yembr n tɩ zĩig a taab.
simulation.explanation1: Maan-wilgr bãan-wilgri zĩig wʋsg. Zĩig fãa tar ninsaal la S, E, I, R, D, Q. Zĩig sõngd taab ne ninsaal kẽn-kẽn.
simulation.explanation2: Tũ ODE wakat sẽn yaa bɩlg. Tõe n lebg β, sigma, gamma, mu, mobility. Wilgri be map, graph, network.
simulation.seird: SEIRD : S, E, I, R, D
simulation.seiqrd: SEIQRD : S, E, I, Q, R, D
simulation.evolutionCurves: Courbes : S, E, I, R, D wakat pʋgẽ
simulation.graphs: Graphiques : Ligne | Épaisseur | Remplissage | Grille | Annotations
simulation.step2: Tũ Démarrer. Wilgri be map la graphiques.
simulation.step4: Lebg mode comparaison n maneg scénario a taab.
simulation.technicalNote: Wakat tɩlg 1 jʋn. Mobility yit diffusion prevalence wʋgdg.

geospatial.interactiveCartographicVisualization: Map sẽn tõe n tʋm ne a taaba
geospatial.explanation1: Tõe n yãk sõor CSV bɩ Excel, wilgri points, clusters, heatmap.
geospatial.multiLayers: Calques wʋsg. Tõe n lebg couleur, rayon, opacité.
geospatial.clustering: Clustering : regroupe points n paam clusters.
geospatial.heatmapConfig: Heatmap : Rayon 25 | Flou 15 | Opacité min | Dégradé
geospatial.note: Dataset fãa tar gũusg a menga.
geospatial.step1: Yãk CSV ne latitude, longitude, cas.
geospatial.step2: Yãk clustering n wilg zĩig fãa, bɩ heatmap n yãk hotspots.
geospatial.step4: Tũ Analyser n paam AI raport.

workspace.explanation1: WebR – tõe n gʋls, yãk, maan R kood. Console, graphiques.
workspace.explanation2: Exécution script, gestion fichiers, console interactive, graphiques, packages.
workspace.interactiveConsoleFeature: Console : tõe n gʋls R, flèches history, graphiques.
workspace.graphicalVisualizations: Graphiques : capture automatique. Mode grille, animation, téléchargement.
workspace.animationBetaDetail: Animation (bêta) : script sẽn maan graphiques wʋsg, tõe n wilg animation.
workspace.animationNote: Animation tʋmda sequences sẽn yãka, pa graphiques sẽn yit rũndã-rũndã.
workspace.packageInstallationDetail: Package yãkdg : webR package pre‑compilés. Console wilgda logs.
workspace.packageNote: Packages sẽn tar dépendances système pa tõe.
workspace.codeExample:
# Courbe épidémique
x <- seq(-5, 10, length.out = 200)
for (i in 1:40) {
  mu <- i / 8
  y <- dnorm(x, mean = mu, sd = 1.5)
  plot(x, y, type="n", ylim=c(0, 0.3), axes=FALSE)
  polygon(c(x, rev(x)), c(y, rep(0, 200)), col="#3b82f622", border=NA)
  lines(x, y, col="#3b82f6", lwd=3)
  Sys.sleep(0.04)
}
workspace.step4: Tũ flèches bɩ bouton n zãgs animation. Tõe n yãk image.

explorer.explanation1: PubMed NCBI. Tõe n bãn, filtre, yãk résumé.
explorer.advancedSearch: Bãn kãseng : mots‑clés, filtre année, type article, tri.
explorer.meshGenerator: MeSH : yit expression, yãk traduction MeSH.
explorer.favoritesExport: Favoris & export : 200 articles. Export RIS (EndNote, Zotero).
explorer.results: Lebgr : bascule recherche/favoris, détails article, graphique temporal.
explorer.step2: Tũ MeSH n paam requête optimisée.
explorer.step5: Bascule Favoris, Export tout n yãk RIS.

analysis.title: IA manegre bãan-wilgri
analysis.description: IA manegre na n wa sõma — insights, cluster, recommandations.

settings.timelineDescription: Slider wakat — sõor sɩda na n be.

modal.title: Wilgri bãan-wilgri
modal.description: Sõor sɩda — OMS, Johns Hopkins, CEREMUJER.

toasts.fileEmpty: Fichier pa be bɩ pa tõe
toasts.formatError: Format pa be — CSV bɩ Excel koe

empty_state.title: Maan-wilgri sɩngr
empty_state.description: Yãk bãan-wilgri wilgri bɩ scénario n sɩng maan-wilgri.

data_modal.title: Yãk sõor
data_modal.csv_label: CSV — zĩisi (colonnes: id, name, population, S, E, I, R, D, latitude, longitude, color, connections, cluster)

explanation_modal.title: Gaf-wilgri
explanation_modal.slider_body: Lɩb slider J0–J365 n yãk bãan-wilgri jʋn fãa. Map la taabal yit rũndã-rũndã. Tũ Play n yãk wakat kẽn-kẽn.
explanation_modal.models_body: SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD. Sor fãa yaa a menga, pa lebgd wakat fãa.
explanation_modal.rt_body: Rt (taux de reproduction effectif) yaa R0 × S/N × (1 − réductions). Rt < 1 wilgd tɩ bãan-wilgri be gũusg pʋgẽ.
explanation_modal.phase_body: Grafik S–I wilgd sor S × I pʋgẽ. Sor sẽn yaa wa tʋʋma yaa bãan-wilgri sõma.
explanation_modal.interventions_body: Sõngr fãa yɛɛsda β, yit sɩngr jʋn. Sõngr tõe n sõng taab (plafon 95%).
explanation_modal.comparison_body: Tũ "Maneg" n sɩng maan-wilgri a to ne gũusg a taab. Kurv wilgda taab.

examples_modal.title: Bãan-wilgri wilgri
examples_modal.subtitle: Gũusg la sõor yit bãan-wilgri sɩda

covid19.name: COVID-19
covid19.description: Bãan-wilgri dũniyã fãa. Tɛɛgr a ɛɛrɛ, wakat incubation 5–6 jʋn, CFR ~1%.

ebola2014.name: Ebola
ebola2014.description: Bãan-wilgri kãseng Afrika Wʋsg. CFR ~50%. Tɛɛgr ne ninsaal kẽn-kẽn.

flu_seasonal.name: Grippe saisonnière
flu_seasonal.description: Bãan-wilgri wakat fãa. R0 tẽnga, yɩɩ sõma wakat bɩlg, kũum bɩlg.

measles.name: Rougeole
measles.description: Bãan sẽn tɛɛgd wʋsg (R0 12–18). Vaksẽ tʋmda n sõma.

meningitis.name: Méningite
meningitis.description: Bãan-wilgri wakat fãa zĩig sẽn boond tɩ "ceinture méningitique" Afrika. Kũum ~10%.

cholera.name: Choléra
cholera.description: Bãan-wilgri yit koom sẽn pa sõma. Kũum wakat bɩlg sã n pa tʋm tɩrgo.

terms.title: Yõod sẽn tũu
terms.subtitle: Wepisia
terms.summary: Yel-wilgre: bɩ y karem yõod ninsã ne yam n tɩ bãng Wepisia tũub tɩrga. Y sã n kẽ n tũ ne tʋʋm-tʋʋmã, y rũndaame tɩ y segda n tũ yõod ninsã.
terms.freeAndOpenDesc: Wepisia yaa yẽesga, MIT licence poorẽ. Y tõe n tũ, lebs n maan, la kɩt tɩ b tũ.
terms.openSourceDesc: Code fãa be GitHub zug, tɩ ned kam tõe n yã n paas.
terms.noWarrantyDesc: Tʋʋm-tʋʋmã bɛɛga wala 'a yɩɩ', paamkãseng ka be. Y sã n tũ, y meng na n bao-ba.
terms.acceptanceDesc: Y sã n tũ Wepisia, y rũndaame tɩ y segda n tũ yõod ninsã.
terms.acceptanceDetail: Yõod ninsã la yãmb sẽn tũud Wepisia tʋʋm-tʋʋmã. Y sã n pa segd ne bʋg a ye, y pa tõe n tũ tʋʋm-tʋʋmã ye.
terms.useDesc: Wepisia yaa karem-zĩiga, zãmsgo, la tʋʋm yɛla wɛɛngẽ épidémiologie la biostatistike pʋgẽ.
terms.permittedPersonal: Yẽ-meng tũub sẽn pa ligd yel-bʋʋg ye
terms.permittedTeaching: Laafi yɛla zãmsgo la pãng paasgo
terms.prohibitedCommercial: Ligd tʋʋm wɛɛngẽ lebgre wall kɩt tɩ b tũ, sɩd-paalgã yiis ye
terms.prohibitedMisuse: Tʋʋm-tʋʋmã tũub sẽn na n yɩɩm-a wall yɩɩm ned a to tũub
terms.prohibitedIllegal: Tʋʋm sẽn yaa sɩd-wẽnd wall tʋʋm sẽn zems ne yõod ye
terms.ipDesc: Wepisia yaa yʋʋr sẽn yaa yembr.
terms.ipDetail: Code yaa MIT licence poorẽ. Y tõe n tũ, lebg, kɩt tɩ b tũ, pʋʋse, tɩlg, lebs n kõ, n paas. Wepisia la Xcept-Health yʋʋrã la b logo-rã yaa Xcept-Health soaba.
terms.licenseNotice: MIT licence – bɩ y yã LICENSE fayɩlgã repository pʋgẽ.
terms.disclaimerDetail: Wepisia kõta paamkãseng a ye, vẽeneg wall sẽn pa vẽeneg, tɩ pa yaoolem ligd yel-bʋʋgã, tũub sẽn zems, wall pa sõmblem ye. Yãmb meng n na n bao tʋʋm-tʋʋmã.
terms.disclaimerMedical: Laafɩ yel-wilgre: Wepisia yaa yɩlem maan-biing ne simulation yɛla. A pa kõta laafɩ wilgr ye. Bõn-kãensã fãa segd n yɩɩ b sẽn yãk n yã n paase. B sẽn maan-a-rãmb pa tar yõod tɩ b sã n maan bɩɩmã.
terms.liabilityDetail: Bõn-kãensã fãa pʋgẽ, Xcept-Health la sẽn paas-a-rãmb pa tar yõod tɩ b sã n maan bɩɩm, wall yel-wẽnd a to, sẽn yi Wepisia tũub.
terms.changesDesc: Tõnd tõe n lebga yõod ninsã wakat a yembr.
terms.changesDetail: Tõnd tara yam tɩ d lebg yõod ninsã wakat a yembr. Lebgrã na n be pʋgã n yɩɩ vẽeneg. Y sã n tũ tʋʋm-tʋʋmã lebgr poorẽ, y rũndaame tɩ y segda n tũ yõod kʋdã.
terms.contactDesc: Y sã n tara sok-y sẽn yaa to-to?

privacy.title: Gũubg yɛla
privacy.subtitle: Wepisia
privacy.summary: Wepisia yaa tʋʋm-tʋʋm sẽn yaa yembr épidémiologie la biostatistike pʋgẽ. Yel-wilgre kãnga weda a sẽn wakd bũmb nins.
privacy.noDataDesc: Wepisia pa tigd bũmb, pa kõndi, pa tũmsd ned yɛl ye. Sõor fãa yaa fu vaa-zuugẽ la f burauzã pʋgẽ.
privacy.localDesc: Bũmb sẽn yaa fu sẽn kẽes (teebl sẽn yaa a woto, paramètres de simulation) bee fu masɩnã pʋgẽ la b sɩbgda f sã n yagl zakã.
privacy.noTrackingDesc: Pa be cookies sẽn yi zĩig a to, pa be scripts dãmb sẽn maand manesem, pa be kootu ye. Fu gũubu waoogame.
privacy.noTrackingData: Bũmb sẽn wilgd fu zĩisg wall cookies dãmb sẽn tũud fu
privacy.noHealthData: Laafɩ yɛl sẽn tõe n yɩɩ fu yɛl
privacy.localStorageDesc: Bũmb a taab n yɩɩd be zĩig kãng pʋgẽ:
privacy.uiState: Manesem sẽn yɩɩ fu tũub (command palette, theme)
privacy.clearLocalStorage: F tõe n sɩbg bũmb nins fãa yik-yɩɩrg a yembr fu burauzã pʋgẽ.
privacy.dataUsageDesc: Bũmb sẽn yaa fu sẽn kẽes wã yaa b sẽn tũud n maan sõorã.
privacy.calculationsDesc: Bũmb fu sẽn kẽes (wala sõor, paramètres dãmb) b tũuda n maan sekr sẽn yit. Pa tũmsd tõnd server dãmb nengẽ ye.
privacy.persistenceDesc: Bũmb ka kõnd f sã n yagl zakã. F tõe n sɩbg bũmb sẽn kõnd n yɩɩd.
privacy.cookiesDetail: Zĩig sẽn kõnd (localStorage) n tõe n gũud fu goam la fu manesem. Bũmb kãens pa cookies ye, la b pa kõt ned a to ye.
privacy.thirdPartiesDesc: Bũmb ka kõt ned a to ye.
privacy.thirdPartiesDetail: Tʋʋm-tʋʋmã pʋgẽ pa be scripts sẽn yi zĩig a to (manesem, kootu) la pa tũmsd bũmb ye. B sẽn tũmsd n yɩɩda b sẽn dogd bũmb sẽn sõng tʋʋm-tʋʋmã (bibliothèques JavaScript, feuilles de style).
privacy.securityDesc: Fu bũmb bee fu yam pʋgẽ.
privacy.localComputation: Sõor sẽn maan zĩig sẽn yaa soaba
privacy.localComputationDesc: Sõor fãa maanda fu masɩnã pʋgẽ. Bũmb ka yiiti fu burauzã ye.
privacy.httpsDesc: Wɛbsaitã bee HTTPS pʋgẽ, tɩ b tõe n sɩbg fayɩlg dãmb n pʋd.
privacy.changesDesc: B sã n lebg bũmb a ye, b na n dogda pʋgã.
privacy.changesDetail: B tõe n lebga yel-wilgre kãng wakat a yembr. Yik-yɩɩrg a poorã bee zugẽ. Bɩ y ges-a wakat fãa.
privacy.contactDesc: Y sã n tara sok-y sẽn yaa to-to?

about.title: Gomd sẽn yaa a soaba
about.subtitle: Wepisia
about.intro: Tʋʋm-tʋʋm sẽn yaa yembr épidémiologie yɛla wɛɛngẽ, b sẽn maan tɩ tʋm zĩig fãa, hali zĩig sẽn pa tar pãng ye
about.visionDesc: Dũniyã zĩisi sẽn pa tar pãng wʋsgo, bũmb pa yɩɩd ye. B maana Wepisia tɩ a tõe n tʋm zĩig fãa: a tʋmda f vaa-zuugẽ, pa tar f raoor ye, a tar goam wʋsgo, la a yaa yembr (MIT).
about.openEpiDesc: OpenEpi lebga sõor maaneg épidémiologie yɛla wɛɛngẽ tɩ a yɩɩ yembr, a yaa zĩig fãa, la a yaa yembr tɩ ned kam tõe n tũ. B kõ-a-la licence MIT, tɩ a leb n yɩɩ gomd sẽn yaa a soaba dũniyã fãa.
about.commitmentDesc: Wepisia yaa yembr, a na n yɩɩ yembr, a yaa yembr (MIT), la a tar goam wʋsgo. Xcept-Health n maan-a, tɩ a wilgd tõnd sẽn yãk: tʋʋm-tʋʋm laafɩ yɛla wɛɛngẽ segd n yɩɩ yembr, tɩ b pa kɩt tɩ ned pa tõe n tũ ye.
about.openEpiHeritageDesc: Bũmb sẽn yɩɩ to-to, sẽn yãk, la b sẽn tũ.
about.openEpiContext: B maana OpenEpi bala b yãame tɩ tʋʋm-tʋʋm sẽn da tar ligd pa tõe n sõng épidémiologist dãmb wakat fãa. B ra tɩ yãka tɩ b na n maan tʋʋm-tʋʋm sẽn yaa sɩdga, b sẽn gol n gũus, la b sẽn lebs n ges, sẽn tar manesem a yembr, sẽn tõe n tʋm yĩngr la zĩig fãa, sẽn pa segd ne platform a yembr, la sẽn yaa yembr.
about.openEpiGoals: B sẽn da yãkã: maan tʋʋm-tʋʋm sẽn yaa sɩdga, sẽn pa segd ne platform a yembr, sẽn yaa yembr; sõng tɩ épidémiologist dãmb la developers dãmb tõe n tʋm taab.
about.feature1: Teebl sẽn tar zĩig wʋsgo, tests de dépistage, b sẽn gesd tɛss dãmb
about.feature2: Panga maaneg cohorte, cas-témoins, essais cliniques
about.feature3: Sõod sẽn yit zĩig zĩig, test χ² de tendance (dose-réponse)
about.feature4: Kõnd fayɩlg sẽn yit la dog fayɩlg sẽn yaa wala
about.genesisDesc: OpenEpi sẽn lebg a ye tɩ yɩ Afrique yɛl
about.genesisText: F. Ariel Shadrac OUEDRAOGO, sẽn yaa Burkina Faso bĩnga, la a yaa doktoro karenba la developer sẽn zãms a menga, n maana Wepisia tɩ a yɩ OpenEpi sẽn lebg a ye tɩ yɩ Afrique yɛl. B maan-a-la teknoliji sẽn yaa sɩdga (React, Vite, Tailwind), tɩ a kõt bũmb nins pʋgẽ:
about.featureModern: Manesem sẽn yaa sɩdga, sẽn tʋmd vɛɛnga, sẽn yɩɩd tʋm zĩig fãa
about.featureSimulation: Simulation multi-régions sẽn yaa sɩdga (SIR, SEIR, SEIRD, SEIQRD)
about.featureGeospatial: Tẽngã zug yãk-yãk sẽn tar manesem (points, clustering, heatmap)
about.featureEditor: Code editor sẽn be (R ne WebAssembly)
about.featureExplorer: PubMed explorer ne MeSH sẽn wilgd fu
about.featureMultilingual: Goam wʋsg (mooré, wolof, haoussa, swahili, français, anglais)
about.recognitionDesc: Tõnd tara pʋʋsg wʋsgo ne b sẽn maan OpenEpi
about.otherContributors: la b sẽn paas n tʋm
about.recognitionConclusion: Sẽn pa b tʋʋmã, Wepisia da pa tõe n zĩnd ye. B code sẽn be MIT licence pʋgẽ n yaa tõnd sẽn zĩnd.
about.contributeDesc: Developers dãmb, épidémiologist dãmb, sẽn tõe n lebg goam, sẽn tõe n maan manesem: fãa sõngda!

notFound.title: Y tẽnga?
notFound.message: Pʋgã yaglame. D bõe-ba. Tũ f masɩn n leok.
notFound.modalText: Kɔɔdinat ninsã yita Monument des Martyrs, Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso – b sẽn teeg b sẽn kɩ tẽngã yĩnga. Zĩig sẽn yaa kãsenga la paoongo.

twoByTwo.title: Tebl 2×2
twoByTwo.description: Bõe odds ratio, risque relatif la tests chi-carré.
twoByTwo.exposedNonDiseased: b sẽn yãk n pa bãmba
twoByTwo.unexposedDiseased: b sẽn pa yãk n bãmba
twoByTwo.unexposedNonDiseased: b sẽn pa yãk n pa bãmba
twoByTwo.increasedRisk: Risque relatif wilgdame tɩ b sẽn yãkã tara bãmba wʋsgo.
twoByTwo.protectiveEffect: Risque relatif wilgdame tɩ b sẽn yãkã kɩtame tɩ bãmba yaa bɩɩma.
twoByTwo.noAssociation: Risque relatif yaa 1, wilgdame tɩ sõod ka be.
twoByTwo.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
twoByTwo.ciNote: IC OR la RR yaa Taylor (Woolf) mani.
twoByTwo.notValidCaseControl: pa segd ne études cas‑témoins ye
twoByTwo.principleText: Tebl 2×2 gũusg wilgdame tɩ sõod b sẽn yãk la bãmba. B maana odds ratio (études cas‑témoins) la risque relatif (études de cohorte), ne tests sẽn wilgd sõod.
twoByTwo.fisherDesc: Zĩnda hypergéométrique zug, b tũuda bɩɩm wɛɛngẽ.
twoByTwo.interpretationText: Sã n yaa OR wall RR IC pa tɩ 1, sõod yaa sɩdga. Chi-carré p‑value wilgdame sõod sɩdgã (p < 0.05).

doseResponse.title: Dose-Réponse sekr
doseResponse.description: Tendans tɛss ne zĩig dãmb sẽn pa yɩɩd ye.
doseResponse.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
doseResponse.resultsPerLevel: Sekr zĩig fãa (tẽegre = zĩig a yembr)
doseResponse.principleText: Tɛss kãnga gũda sɩd-sɩd sẽn be dosis la bãmba sʋka. B tũuda a soab n na n bãng tɩ dosis waoogd wall fɩkd bãmba.
doseResponse.methodsText: Zĩig fãa, b maana odds ratio la risque relatif ne zĩig sẽn yaa toogdo. Tɛssã yaa χ² tɛss sẽn yaa a soaba.
doseResponse.interpretationText: Sã n yaa p-value < 0.05, tendans yaa sɩdga. Sõngr (zĩnd/pa zĩnd) wilgdame tɩ bãmba waoogda wall fɩkda.

rByC.title: Tebl R×C
rByC.description: Gũusg tebl sẽn tar zĩig wʋsg.
rByC.significantInterpretation: p-yõod {{p}} wilgdame tɩ sõod yaa sɩdga (p < 0.05). Cramér V {{v}} wilgdame sõod pãngã.
rByC.nonSignificantInterpretation: p-yõod {{p}} wilgdame tɩ sõod ka be (p ≥ 0.05). Cramér V {{v}} wilgdame tɩ sõod yaa bɩɩma wall ka.
rByC.jStatError: jStat pa be - sõor maaneg pa tõe ye
rByC.minRows: Tẽnga a yi la wʋsg n datame
rByC.minCols: Sõnga a yi la wʋsg n datame
rByC.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
rByC.principleText: Chi-carré (χ²) tɛss yaa b sẽn tũud n bãng sõod sẽn be tẽnga la sõnga sʋka. A maanda manesem ne bũmb sẽn yã la bũmb sẽn yɩɩd.
rByC.independenceDesc: Tẽnga la sõnga pa taab ye.
rByC.independentSampleDesc: Sɛb fãa segd n yɩɩ yembr.
rByC.expectedCountsDesc: Sɛb sẽn yɩɩd 5 bilga wʋsg pa segd n yɩɩ 20% ye. Sã n pa woto, bɩ y tũ Fisher tɛss.
rByC.chiSquareDesc: Sum (yã – yɩɩd)² / yɩɩd. Sõor waoogdame sã n yaa sõod waoogd.
rByC.pValueDesc: Sẽn yɩɩd tɩ χ² sõor yaa kãsenga wall waoogd wʋsg. Sã n yaa p < 0.05, b wilgdame tɩ sõod yaa sɩdga.
rByC.cramersVDesc: Sõod pãng wilgda. 0 wata sõod ka be, 1 wata sõod pãnga.
rByC.complementaryMethodsDesc: Tebl 2×2 wɛɛngẽ, tɛss a taab tõe n yɩɩd:
rByC.fisherExactDesc: B tũuda sã n yaa sɛb sẽn yɩɩd bilga.
rByC.yatesCorrectionDesc: B tũuda n lebg tɛssã n yɩɩd sɩdga.
rByC.jStatNote: Sõor kãens yaa jStat sẽn kõ.
rByC.exampleText: B sã n dat n bãng sõod sẽn be tabagisme la cancer du poumon sʋka, tebl 2×2 tõe n yɩɩ:
rByC.exampleInterpretation: χ² tɛss na n kõ p < 0.001, tɩ wilgd tɩ sõod yaa sɩdga. Cramér V na n yɩɩ 0.45, tɩ yaa pãnga tɛka.

screening.title: Sɛb n ges
screening.description: Tɛss sẽn maan manesem ne zĩig wʋsg.
screening.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
screening.rocLabel: TPR = vrais positifs, FPR = faux positifs
screening.helpPrincipleText: Tʋʋm-tʋʋm kãng yaa OpenEpi « Screening Test ». A gũda tɛss sẽn tõe n yɩɩd ne zĩig wʋsg. Sẽn yɩɩd fãa, a maana :
screening.helpEntropy: A wilgda LR zĩig fãa la AUC ne IC.
screening.helpRocDesc: B gũda zĩig fãa n na n yɩ ROC.
screening.helpLevelLRDesc: LR = (casᵢ / non‑casᵢ) / (total cas / total non‑cas). IC yaa Katz mani.
screening.helpEntropyMethodDesc: Pʋgẽ waoogr (entropie de Shannon) sã n yaa tɛss sẽn yaa sɩdga.
screening.helpExampleText: B sã n dat n bãng diabète ne glycémie, b tõe n kẽes :
screening.helpOrderNoteText: B segd n yɩɩ zĩig sẽn pa tar pãng n tɩ zĩig sẽn tar pãnga.

oneRate.title: One Rate
oneRate.description: Gũusg tẽnga ne a sɩd-sɩd wɛɛngr – PersonTime1
oneRate.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
oneRate.interpretationText: Tẽnga sẽn yã yaa {{rate}} sɛb ned-wakat yembr pʋgẽ. IC {{level}}% (Fisher) yaa {{lower}} n tɩ {{upper}}.{{precision}}
oneRate.principleText: Tẽnga gũda bũmb sẽn yit wakat pʋgẽ. A yaa sɛb n paas n maan wakat.
oneRate.rateHighDesc: Bũmb sẽn yit wakat a yembr pʋgẽ
oneRate.rateLowDesc: Bũmb sẽn pa yit wʋsg ye
oneRate.ciText: IC 95% wilgdame tɩ tẽnga sẽn yaa sɩdga bee zĩig kãng pʋgẽ ne 95%.
oneRate.midpDesc: Correction de continuité, b tũuda sɛb sẽn yaa bɩɩm wɛɛngẽ.
oneRate.fisherDesc: Zĩnda χ² zug, b tũuda sɛb sẽn pa waoog ye.
oneRate.exampleText: B sã n yã sɛb 33 ned-wakat 22 pʋgẽ, tẽnga yaa :

twoRates.title: TwoRates
twoRates.description: Gũusg tẽnga a yi wɛɛngẽ – Ratio, wɛɛngr, IC (PersonTime2, OpenEpi)
twoRates.errorNoCases: Sõnga a yembr n dat n tar sɛb.
twoRates.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
twoRates.rateBasedTitle: Tẽnga sẽn zĩnd ne IC {{level}}% ({{scale}} wakat)
twoRates.attributableTitle: Paalg sẽn yit : Étiologique wall Préventive
twoRates.helpPrincipleText: Tʋʋm-tʋʋm kãng yaa OpenEpi PersonTime2. A gũda tẽnga a yi (sɛb / neda-wakat) n maan ratio (RR), wɛɛngr, la IC ne mani wʋsg.
twoRates.helpMidp: Miettinen (1974d) : tɛss sẽn yaa sɩdga, b tũuda.

meanCi.title: Sɩd-sɩd zĩig (MeanCI)
meanCi.optional: yɛl sẽn pa dat n tũ
meanCi.interpretationText: Sɩd-sɩd {{level}}%, tẽnga sẽn yaa sɩdga bee {{lower}} la {{upper}} sʋka (t mani).
meanCi.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
meanCi.fpcNote: FPC maana sã n yaa N sẽn yaa bɩɩma.
meanCi.principleText: Tʋʋm-tʋʋm kãng yaa OpenEpi MeanCI. A gũda sɩd-sɩd zĩig tẽnga wɛɛngẽ. Mani a yi be: normal (Z) la t de Student.
meanCi.zVsT: Z: n ≥ 30. t: n < 30 wall σ pa be.
meanCi.fpcDesc: Sõor fɩkda sã n yaa N sẽn pa waoog ye.

medianCi.title: Sɩd-sɩd zĩig mediane / percentile
medianCi.description: Zĩig percentile sẽn yaa soaba ninsaalbã pʋgẽ
medianCi.interpretationText: Sɩd-sɩd {{level}}%, percentile {{percentile}}% bee rangs {{lowerRank}} n tɩ {{upperRank}} pʋgẽ sɛb {{n}} pʋgẽ.
medianCi.enterData: Bɩ y kẽes bũmb n sek
medianCi.howToUseSteps:
1. Sɩbg f sɛb {{n}} n yɩɩd.
2. Sɛb {{lowerRank}}e yaa toogdo.
3. Sɛb {{upperRank}}e yaa zugu.
Sɩd-sɩd {{level}}%, percentile {{percentile}}% bee b sʋka.
medianCi.helpPrincipleText: Tʋʋm-tʋʋm kãng yaa OpenEpi Median/Percentile CI. A gũda rang percentile wɛɛngẽ. B tũuda approximation normale.
medianCi.rankIntervalDesc: Zĩig bee rangs pʋgẽ, pa yõod ye.
medianCi.conditionDesc: Approximation yaa sɩdga sã n yaa n·p ≥ 5 la n·(1‑p) ≥ 5.
medianCi.intervalFormula: IC – [max(1, floor(rang – z·SE)) , min(n, ceil(rang + z·SE))]
